config.script:
function fopen() : fopen = false #ifndef _DEBUG trans_.message 0,0,"fisk kas pooolings" #endif dim pM60224 : set pM60224 = doc_.getmodule(60224) dim pTransfer : set pTransfer = pM60224.new_CashReq_Optimus_Tango_Transfer()
if not pTransfer.connect() then exit function end if
dim pReceiptItemArray dim pReceiptSummary set pReceiptSummary = pTransfer.read_receipt(pReceiptItemArray) if pReceiptSummary is nothing then exit function end if
if not pTransfer.load_stawki_vat() then exit function end if
trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_PARAGON) trans_.var(APPVAR_SPRZEDAZ_DETALICZNA) = clng(N5SPRZEDAZ_BRUTTO) dim pOpenFormDokMag : set pOpenFormDokMag = doc_.getmodule(60129).prepare_form_open_command(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,0,0) if pOpenFormDokMag is nothing then exit function end if dim pFormDokMag : set pFormDokMag = doc_.getpagehli(pOpenFormDokMag) if pFormDokMag is nothing then exit function end if
dim pM60226 : set pM60226 = doc_.getmodule(60226)
dim strErrorMsg : strErrorMsg = pM60226.fill_paragon_from_receiptitems(pTransfer,pFormDokMag.root,pReceiptItemArray) if strErrorMsg <> "" then exit function end if
pFormDokMag.domodalauto end function
